description: The impeachment of South Korean President Park Geun-hye following a massive influence-peddling scandal involving her confidante Choi Soon-sil. The Constitutional Court of Korea unanimously upheld the impeachment in March 2017, leading to her immediate removal from office and subsequent criminal conviction.

key_events.description: News reports reveal the influence of 'shadow president' Choi Soon-sil.
Millions participate in 'Candlelight Vigils' demanding resignation.
National Assembly votes to impeach Park Geun-hye.
Constitutional Court upholds the impeachment motion.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling extreme public consensus where civil society mobilization force-multiplies legislative outcomes.
